Transcript:
hey everybody I want to talk about kpis
it is the spring of
2024 and everything is chaotic yet again
in the sales world we all know the
standard and traditional kpis right it
could be anything from connect ratios to
conversion ratios to open raos to
meeting set ratios all that stuff here's
the thing that's different you've got to
start looking at your own data to
determine what your kpis are the things
I just suggested are kind of table
Stakes everybody should be doing that
what you need to know though is what are
the kpis that actually tell you that a
conversion is going to happen it could
be a conversion from a cold call to a
first meeting from a first meeting to a
second meeting from a demo to putting
together a proposal whatever it is you
got to look at your own data to
determine what are the best kpis for you
because all the ones that everyone tells
you to follow those are all top of the
funnel apis we need to start looking at
our middle and backend the funnel kpis
